title: Deep consolidation pass complete
body: Closed claim 1271c798-579c-4dcb-8a92-089225440704 after implementing the owner-requested deep consolidation pass. Hard/critical fitness pressure is removed; remaining fitness output is soft-only. PR-87 no longer depends on personal Claude plan paths; repo-continuity history is archived; PDR-018 carries disposition-drift doctrine; abandoned commit_queue entries are cleared with closed-claim evidence preserved.
